EFO_0009460.title: ACPA-negative rheumatoid arthritis
EFO_0009460.description: A type of rheumatoid arthritis that tests negative for certain antibodies.

EFO_0009459.title: ACPA-positive rheumatoid arthritis
EFO_0009459.description: A type of rheumatoid arthritis that tests positive for certain antibodies.

EFO_0007659.title: APOE carrier status
EFO_0007659.description: quantification of the presence or absence of apolipoprotein E (APOE) in an individual

MONDO:0004975.title: Alzheimer disease
MONDO:0004975.description: A progressive brain disease that causes memory loss, confusion, and changes in thinking and behavior. The most common cause of dementia.

EFO_0007788.title: BMI-adjusted waist-hip ratio
EFO_0007788.description: waist-hip ratio that has been adjusted by subjects’ body mass index

EFO_0004458.title: C-reactive protein measurement
EFO_0004458.description: C-reactive protein (CRP) measurement is a measurement of the level of C-reactive protein in the blood.  Levels are known to rise in response to inflammation, CRP is therefore used as a clinical measure of inflammation. The measurement is used in the process of clinical diagnosis as high levels of CRP are associated with cardiovascular disease, diabetes and hypertension and in some cancers. | is about MESH:D002097

MONDO:0100096.title: COVID-19
MONDO:0100096.description: A disease caused by infection with severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2. [MONDO: patterns/infectious_disease_by_agent]

HP_0000175.title: Cleft palate
HP_0000175.description: Cleft palate is a developmental defect of the palate resulting from a failure of fusion of the palatine processes and manifesting as a separation of the roof of the mouth (soft and hard palate).

HP_0000964.title: Eczematoid dermatitis
HP_0000964.description: Eczema is a form of dermatitis that is characterized by scaly, pruritic, erythematous lesions located on flexural surfaces. [PMID: 32412211]

EFO_0004541.title: HbA1c measurement
EFO_0004541.description: A quantification of glycated A1c hemoglobin in blood used as an index for blood glucose level over several months.

HP_0003124.title: Hypercholesterolemia
HP_0003124.description: An increased concentration of cholesterol in the blood. [HPO_CONTRIBUTOR: gcarletti]

EFO_0004194.title: IGA glomerulonephritis
EFO_0004194.description: Inflammation of a specific segment of glomeruli within the kidney. [NCIT: P378]

HP_0002140.title: Ischemic stroke
HP_0002140.description: A type of stroke caused by blocked blood flow to the brain, often due to blood clots.

HP_0012594.title: Moderate albuminuria
HP_0012594.description: The presence of moderately increased concentrations of albumin in the urine, defined as and albumin-creatinine ratio (ACR) of 30 to 299 mg/gm (3.4 to 34 mg/mmol). [HPO_CONTRIBUTOR: Eurenomics_fschaefer] [PMID: 30571025]

EFO_0005094.title: P wave duration
EFO_0005094.description: measurement of the time from start to finish of the P wave, in the electrocardiograph illustrating the initial deflection of the cardiac cycle, representing the excitation of the atria.

EFO_0600085.title: PP interval
EFO_0600085.description: An interval measured from the onset of the P wave in one PQRST wave complex to the onset of the P wave in the following PQRST wave complex.

EFO_0004462.title: PR interval
EFO_0004462.description: A PR interval is an  electrocardiography measurement which measures from the beginning of the P wave to the beginning of the QRS complex in the heart's electrical cycle

MONDO:0005180.title: Parkinson disease
MONDO:0005180.description: A brain disorder that causes tremors, stiffness, and difficulty with movement and balance. Symptoms worsen over time.

EFO_0004682.title: QT interval
EFO_0004682.description: The QT interval is a measure of the time between the start of the Q wave and the end of the T wave in the heart's electrical cycle

EFO_0004831.title: RR interval
EFO_0004831.description: A RR interval is an  electrocardiography measurement  - R wave to R wave interval (RR interval) and is the inverse of the heart rate.

EFO_0009188.title: Red cell distribution width
EFO_0009188.description: Red blood cell distribution width (RDW or RDW-CV or RCDW and RDW-SD) is a measure of the range of variation of red blood cell (RBC) volume that is reported as part of a standard complete blood count. Usually red blood cells are a standard size of about 6-8 μm in diameter. Certain disorders, however, cause a significant variation in cell size. Higher RDW values indicate greater variation in size. Normal reference range of RDW-CV in human red blood cells is 11.5-14.5%.[1] If anemia is observed, RDW test results are often used together with mean corpuscular volume (MCV) results to determine the possible causes of the anemia. It is mainly used to differentiate an anemia of mixed causes from an anemia of a single cause.

HP_0001873.title: Thrombocytopenia
HP_0001873.description: A reduction in the number of circulating thrombocytes.

HP_0004418.title: Thrombophlebitis
HP_0004418.description: Inflammation of a vein associated with venous thrombosis (blood clot formation within the vein).

OBA_1000983.title: Thyroid stimulating hormone level
OBA_1000983.description: The amount of a thyroid stimulating hormone when measured in anatomical entity. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

EFO_0004703.title: age at menarche
EFO_0004703.description: The age of onset of (human) menarche, the beginning of the first menstrual cycle in an individual

EFO_0004704.title: age at menopause
EFO_0004704.description: The age of onset of (human) menopause, the beginning of the first menstrual cycle in an individual

OBA_1000840.title: alcohol consumption quality
OBA_1000840.description: The quality of a alcohol consumption. [obo: oba/patterns/entity_attribute_part_of]

MONDO:0005271.title: allergic disease
MONDO:0005271.description: Conditions where the immune system overreacts to normally harmless substances, causing symptoms like sneezing, rashes, or breathing problems.

EFO_0020865.title: aortic measurement
EFO_0020865.description: Measurement of some parts of the aorta, including ascending aorta distensibility and area.

MONDO:0004979.title: asthma
MONDO:0004979.description: A chronic condition where airways become inflamed and narrow, causing wheezing, coughing, chest tightness, and difficulty breathing.

EFO_0005140.title: autoimmune disease
EFO_0005140.description: Conditions where the immune system mistakenly attacks the body's own healthy tissues and organs.

EFO_0007825.title: balding measurement
EFO_0007825.description: A measure of hair loss or balding patterns, often related to genetics and hormones.

EFO_0007777.title: base metabolic rate measurement
EFO_0007777.description: quantification of an individual's base metabolic rate, the minimum amount of energy required to sustain life while at complete rest, including the body being in a post-absorptive state (ie the digestive system is inactive). BMR differs from RMR because BMR measurements must meet total physiological equilibrium whereas RMR conditions of measurement can be altered and defined by the contextual limitations.

MONDO:0024431.title: bilirubin metabolism disease
MONDO:0024431.description: A condition where the body has trouble processing bilirubin, leading to yellowing of the skin and eyes.

OBA_VT0000188.title: blood glucose amount
OBA_VT0000188.description: The amount of a glucose when measured in blood. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

EFO_0005106.title: body composition measurement
EFO_0005106.description: measurement of the percentages of fat, bone and muscle in human bodies

OBA_VT0001253.title: body height
OBA_VT0001253.description: The height of a multicellular organism. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004340.title: body mass index
EFO_0004340.description: An indicator of body density as determined by the relationship of BODY WEIGHT to BODY HEIGHT. BMI=weight (kg)/height squared (m2). BMI correlates with body fat (ADIPOSE TISSUE). Their relationship varies with age and gender. For adults, BMI falls into these categories: below 18.5 (underweight); 18.5-24.9 (normal); 25.0-29.9 (overweight); 30.0 and above (obese). (National Center for Health Statistics, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention)

EFO_0004338.title: body weight
EFO_0004338.description: The mass or quantity of heaviness of an individual. It is expressed by units of pounds or kilograms.

OBA_1000110.title: bone tissue density
OBA_1000110.description: The mass density of a bone tissue. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0010811.title: carbohydrate intake measurement
EFO_0010811.description: Quantification of the carbohydrate intake of an individual.

MONDO:0015129.title: chronic primary adrenal insufficiency
MONDO:0015129.description: A chronic disorder of the adrenal cortex resulting in the inadequate production of glucocorticoid and mineralocorticoid hormones. [Orphanet: 101959]

EFO_0008328.title: chronotype measurement
EFO_0008328.description: quantification of some aspect of chronotype such as ease of getting up in the morning

EFO_0003959.title: cleft lip
EFO_0003959.description: Congenital defect in the upper lip where the maxillary prominence fails to merge with the merged medial nasal prominences. It is thought to be caused by faulty migration of the mesoderm in the head region.

MONDO:0005575.title: colorectal cancer
MONDO:0005575.description: Cancer that develops in the colon (large intestine) or rectum, often starting as small growths called polyps.

EFO_0009518.title: complication
EFO_0009518.description: Any disease or disorder that occurs during the course of, or because of, another disease, treatment, or procedure. [ NCI ]

MONDO:0015722.title: congenital vitamin K-dependent coagulation factors deficiency
MONDO:0015722.description: Congenital vitamin K-dependent coagulation factors deficiency involving multiple coagulation factors.

MONDO:0018102.title: corneal dystrophy
MONDO:0018102.description: The term corneal dystrophy embraces a heterogeneous group of bilateral genetically determined non-inflammatory corneal diseases that are usually restricted to the cornea. The designation is imprecise but remains in vogue because of its clinical value. [Orphanet: 34533]

EFO_0004723.title: coronary artery calcification
EFO_0004723.description: Calcium deposits in the coronary arteries, a sign of atherosclerosis.

OBA_1001005.title: creatine level
OBA_1001005.description: The amount of a creatine when measured in anatomical entity. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

EFO_0004617.title: cystatin C measurement
EFO_0004617.description: is a quantification of serum cystatin C C (formerly gamma trace, post-gamma-globulin or neuroendocrine basic polypeptide),[1] a protein encoded by the CST3 gene, is mainly used as a biomarker of kidney function and kidney disease.

MONDO:0001627.title: dementia
MONDO:0001627.description: A decline in memory, thinking, and reasoning skills that interferes with daily activities. Can be caused by various brain conditions.

OBA_2045237.title: dentate gyrus volume
OBA_2045237.description: The volume of a dentate gyrus of hippocampal formation. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0006336.title: diastolic blood pressure
EFO_0006336.description: The blood pressure after the contraction of the heart while the chambers of the heart refill with blood.

EFO_0004842.title: eosinophil count
EFO_0004842.description: Is a quantification of eosinphils in blood. | The number of granulocytes (polymorphonuclear leukocytes) in a specified volume of blood, usually 1 cubic millimeter.

EFO_0004305.title: erythrocyte count
EFO_0004305.description: The number of red blood cells per unit volume in a sample of venous blood.

OBA_0003460.title: erythrocyte volume
OBA_0003460.description: The volume of a erythrocyte. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004697.title: estradiol measurement
EFO_0004697.description: A measurement of estradiol, a female hormone important for reproductive health and bone strength.

EFO_0004630.title: factor VIII measurement
EFO_0004630.description: Is a quantification of factor VIII in serum, Factor VIII (FVIII) is an essential blood clotting protein, also known as anti-hemophilic factor (AHF). In humans, Factor VIII is encoded by the F8 gene.[1][2] Defects in this gene results in hemophilia A.

PATO_0000383.title: female
PATO_0000383.description: A biological sex quality inhering in an individual or a population that only produces gametes that can be fertilised by male gametes.

MONDO:0001056.title: gastric cancer
MONDO:0001056.description: Cancer that develops in the stomach.

MONDO:0018177.title: glioblastoma
MONDO:0018177.description: A malignant astrocytoma characterized by the presence of small areas of necrotizing tissue that is surrounded by anaplastic cells as well as the presence of hyperplastic blood vessels, and that has a poor prognosis.

OBA_0003747.title: glomerular filtration rate
OBA_0003747.description: The rate of a glomerular filtration. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

OBA_1001087.title: heart rate
OBA_1001087.description: The rate of a heart contraction. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004612.title: high density lipoprotein cholesterol measurement
EFO_0004612.description: A measurement of 'good' cholesterol in the blood, which helps remove other forms of cholesterol and reduce heart disease risk.

EFO_1001958.title: high grade ovarian serous adenocarcinoma
EFO_1001958.description: An aggressive type of ovarian cancer that develops from the cells lining the ovary.

EFO_0009394.title: hippocampal CA1 volume
EFO_0009394.description: Volume of hippocampal CA1, which is the part of hippocampus proper bounded by CA2 and the subiculum, characterized by pyramidal neurons that receive projections from pyramidal neurons of CA3 via the Schaffer collaterals.

EFO_0009395.title: hippocampal CA3 volume
EFO_0009395.description: Volume of hippocampal CA3, which is the part of hippocampus proper bounded by the hilus of the dentate gyrus and area CA2, characterized by large pyramidal cells and a dense projection from dentate gyrus granule cell mossy fibers.

EFO_0009401.title: hippocampal amigdala transition area volume
EFO_0009401.description: Volume of hippocampal amigdala transition area.

OBA_2050043.title: hippocampal fissure volume
OBA_2050043.description: The volume of a hippocampal sulcus. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

OBA_2045244.title: hippocampal formation volume
OBA_2045244.description: The volume of a hippocampal formation. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0005035.title: hippocampal volume
EFO_0005035.description: Measurement of the volume of the hippocampus

OBA_2045245.title: hippocampus fimbria volume
OBA_2045245.description: The volume of a hippocampus fimbria. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

OBA_2050050.title: hippocampus molecular layer volume
OBA_2050050.description: The volume of a hippocampus molecular layer. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0000768.title: idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
EFO_0000768.description: A lung disease where scar tissue builds up, making it hard to breathe.

OBA_VT0003564.title: insulin secretion trait
OBA_VT0003564.description: The quality of a insulin secretion. [obo: oba/patterns/entity_attribute_part_of]

EFO_0004695.title: intraocular pressure measurement
EFO_0004695.description: Is a quantification of intraocular pressure. Increased intraocular pressure is a heritable risk factor for primary open angle glaucoma.

MONDO:0002279.title: iron metabolism disease
MONDO:0002279.description: Conditions affecting how the body processes and uses iron.

EFO_0010176.title: keratinocyte carcinoma
EFO_0010176.description: A skin cancer arising from the keratin-producing cells of the epidermis. The term encompasses both basal cell cancer and squamous cell cancer.

MONDO:0015486.title: keratoconus
MONDO:0015486.description: A degenerative, structural disorder of the eye, characterized by a cone-shaped protrusion of the cornea. It may lead to visual disturbances. [NCIT: P378]

EFO_1001870.title: late-onset Alzheimer's disease
EFO_1001870.description: This is the most common form of the disease, which happens to people age 65 and older. It may or may not run in families. So far, researchers haven’t found a particular gene that causes it. No one knows for sure why some people get it and others don’t.

EFO_0008373.title: left ventricular ejection fraction measurement
EFO_0008373.description: quantification of the volumetric fraction of blood pumped out of the left ventricle

OBA_VT0000217.title: leukocyte quantity
OBA_VT0000217.description: The amount of a leukocyte. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

OBA_VT0005372.title: life span determination trait
OBA_VT0005372.description: The process quality of a determination of adult lifespan. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0006925.title: lipoprotein A measurement
EFO_0006925.description: A measurement of a specific type of cholesterol particle that can increase heart disease risk when levels are high.

MONDO:0021116.title: luminal A breast carcinoma
MONDO:0021116.description: A biologic subset of breast cancer defined by high expression of genes characteristic of luminal epithelial cells, including estrogen receptor (ER), estrogen regulated protein LIV-1, and the transcription factors hepatocyte nuclear factor 3, HNF3A, XBP1, and GATA 3. This subtype of breast cancer is associated with a good prognosis.

MONDO:0021115.title: luminal B breast carcinoma
MONDO:0021115.description: A biologic subset of breast cancer defined by low to moderate expression of genes characteristic of luminal epithelial cells including estrogen receptor (ER), and high expression of GGH, LAPTM4B, and CCNE1. This subtype of breast cancer is associated with a good prognosis, although not as favorable as the luminal A subtype.

EFO_0004587.title: lymphocyte count
EFO_0004587.description: A quantification of lymphocytes in blood.

EFO_0007993.title: lymphocyte percentage of leukocytes
EFO_0007993.description: A calculated measurement in which the number of lymphocytes in a specified sample of blood is divided by the total number of white blood cells in the sample, and the result presented as a ratio, fraction, quotient or percentage.

MONDO:0002009.title: major depressive disorder
MONDO:0002009.description: An episode of depression lasting two or more weeks without an intervening episode of mania. [NCIT: P378]

PATO_0000384.title: male
PATO_0000384.description: A biological sex quality inhering in an individual or a population whose sex organs contain only male gametes.

EFO_0004527.title: mean corpuscular hemoglobin
EFO_0004527.description: The MCH is  the average mass of hemoglobin per red blood cell in a sample of blood and is calculated by dividing the total mass of hemoglobin by the RBC count

EFO_0005091.title: monocyte count
EFO_0005091.description: quantification of monocytes in the blood

MONDO:0000334.title: multinodular goiter
MONDO:0000334.description: Nodular goiter characterized by more than one discrete tissue mass. [NCIT: C131438]

MONDO:0005301.title: multiple sclerosis
MONDO:0005301.description: An autoimmune disease that damages the protective covering of nerve fibers, causing communication problems between the brain and body.

EFO_0007660.title: neuroticism measurement
EFO_0007660.description: Quantification of some aspect of neuroticism or neurotic behaviour, such as severity or frequency of neurotic behaviour. This is usually assessed via a standardised questionnaire.

EFO_0007990.title: neutrophil percentage of leukocytes
EFO_0007990.description: A calculated measurement in which the number of neutrophil granulocytes is divided by the number of all white blood cells in a specified sample of peripheral venous blood, and the result presented as a ratio, fraction, quotient or percentage. A neutrophil is, or is in the process of becoming, a granular leucocyte having a nucleus with three to five lobes connected by threads of chromatin, cytoplasm containing very fine granules, and which is readily stainable with neutral dyes.

EFO_0007794.title: nicotine metabolite ratio
EFO_0007794.description: quantification of the ratio of 3’-trans-hydroxycotinine to cotinine in a sample, typically in a urine or blood sample

EFO_0008421.title: non-alcoholic fatty liver disease severity measurement
EFO_0008421.description: Quantification of the severity of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, typically by a histological grading.

MONDO:0001658.title: nontoxic goiter
MONDO:0001658.description: Sporadic enlargement of the thyroid gland that is not associated with changes in thyroid function or malignancy. [NCIT: P378]

EFO_0009102.title: number of children ever born measurement
EFO_0009102.description: A measurement of the number of children born

EFO_1001516.title: ovarian serous carcinoma
EFO_1001516.description: A specific type of ovarian cancer that develops from the cells lining the ovary.

MONDO:0005184.title: pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma
MONDO:0005184.description: An infiltrating glandular cancer that arises from the epithelial cells of the pancreas. It affects males more often than females and the patients are usually over 50 years of age. Microscopically it is characterized by the presence of glandular (ductal) differentiation and desmoplastic stroma formation. Signs and symptoms include pain, loss of weight, and jaundice. It grows rapidly and is usually detected after it has metastasized to other anatomic sites. The prognosis is usually poor.

OBA_2050005.title: parasubiculum volume
OBA_2050005.description: The volume of a parasubiculum. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004309.title: platelet count
EFO_0004309.description: The number of PLATELETS per unit volume in a sample of venous BLOOD.

OBA_0003277.title: platelet volume
OBA_0003277.description: The volume of a platelet. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0010733.title: polyunsaturated fatty acid measurement
EFO_0010733.description: A measurement of healthy fats in the blood that are important for heart and brain health.

OBA_2050049.title: presubiculum volume
OBA_2050049.description: The volume of a presubiculum. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

MONDO:0008315.title: prostate cancer
MONDO:0008315.description: Cancer that develops in the prostate gland in men.

OBA_2050200.title: prostate specific antigen amount
OBA_2050200.description: The amount of a prostate-specific antigen when measured in anatomical entity. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

OBA_2050117.title: reproductive behavior trait
OBA_2050117.description: The quality of a reproductive behavior. [obo: oba/patterns/entity_attribute_part_of]

EFO_0007986.title: reticulocyte count
EFO_0007986.description: The number of reticulocytes per unit volume of blood. Reticulocytes are immature red blood cells and typically compose aoubt 1% of red blood cells in the human body.

OBA_2050062.title: serum alanine aminotransferase amount
OBA_2050062.description: The amount of a alanine aminotransferase when measured in blood serum. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

EFO_0006527.title: smoking status measurement
EFO_0006527.description: self-reported binary measure, used to denote whether an individual is currently or has ever been a smoker

EFO_0009282.title: sodium measurement
EFO_0009282.description: A quantitative measurement of the amount of sodium present in a sample.

OBA_2050024.title: subiculum volume
OBA_2050024.description: The volume of a subiculum. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004279.title: suntan
EFO_0004279.description: An induced skin pigment ( MELANIN) darkening after exposure to SUNLIGHT or ULTRAVIOLET RAYS. The degree of tanning depends on the intensity and duration of UV exposure, and genetic factors.

MONDO:0007915.title: systemic lupus erythematosus
MONDO:0007915.description: An autoimmune disease that can affect multiple organs, causing joint pain, skin rashes, and organ damage.

EFO_0006335.title: systolic blood pressure
EFO_0006335.description: The blood pressure during the contraction of the left ventricle of the heart.

EFO_0004281.title: testicular neoplasm
EFO_0004281.description: Tumors or cancer of the TESTIS. Germ cell tumors ( GERMINOMA) of the testis constitute 95% of all testicular neoplasms.

OBA_1001010.title: thyroxine level
OBA_1001010.description: The amount of a thyroxine when measured in anatomical entity. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute_location]

EFO_0004574.title: total cholesterol measurement
EFO_0004574.description: A measurement of all cholesterol types in the blood, used to assess cardiovascular disease risk.

EFO_0009806.title: total hip arthroplasty
EFO_0009806.description: A surgical procedure in which the hip joint is replaced by a prosthetic implant, that is, a hip prosthesis. A total hip replacement (total hip arthroplasty) consists of replacing both the acetabulum and the femoral head.

EFO_0020975.title: total knee arthroplasty
EFO_0020975.description: A surgical procedure in which the knee joint is replaced by a prosthetic implant.

EFO_0004530.title: triglyceride measurement
EFO_0004530.description: A measurement of fats in the blood that can increase heart disease risk when levels are too high.

MONDO:0005147.title: type 1 diabetes mellitus
MONDO:0005147.description: A lifelong condition where the pancreas produces little or no insulin, requiring daily insulin injections.

EFO_0004531.title: urate measurement
EFO_0004531.description: A urate measurement is the quantification of some urate in body fluid

EFO_0004761.title: uric acid measurement
EFO_0004761.description: Is a quantification of uric acid, typically in blood. Uric acid is associated with gout, insulin resistance and cardivascular disease.

EFO_0007778.title: urinary albumin to creatinine ratio
EFO_0007778.description: quantification of the ratio of albumin to creatinine in a urine sample

MONDO:0001187.title: urinary bladder cancer
MONDO:0001187.description: Cancer that develops in the bladder, the organ that stores urine.

MONDO:0004986.title: urinary bladder carcinoma
MONDO:0004986.description: Cancer that develops in the bladder, the organ that stores urine.

EFO_0004312.title: vital capacity
EFO_0004312.description: The volume of air that is exhaled by a maximal expiration following a maximal inspiration.

EFO_0004620.title: vitamin B12 measurement
EFO_0004620.description: is a quantification of Vitamin B12, vitamin B12 or vitamin B-12, is a water-solublevitamin with a key role in the normal functioning of the brain and nervous system, and for the formation of blood. It is one of the eight B vitamins. It is normally involved in themetabolism of every cell of the human body, especially affecting DNA synthesis and regulation, but also fatty acid synthesis and energy production. It is the largest and most structurally complicated vitamin and can be produced industrially only through bacterial fermentation-synthesis.

OBA_1000968.title: vitamin D level
OBA_1000968.description: The amount of vitamin D in the body, important for bone health and immune function.

OBA_1001085.title: waist circumference
OBA_1001085.description: The circumference of a abdominal segment of trunk. [AUTO: patterns/patterns/entity_attribute]

EFO_0004343.title: waist-hip ratio
EFO_0004343.description: The waist circumference measurement divided by the hip circumference measurement. For both men and women, a waist-to-hip ratio (WHR) of 1.0 or higher is considered "at risk" for undesirable health consequences, such as heart disease and ailments associated with OVERWEIGHT. A healthy WHR is 0.90 or less for men, and 0.80 or less for women. (National Center for Chronic Disease Prevention and Health Promotion, 2004)
